Columns (from left to right):
- Column 1: All empty (□)

- Column 3: All filled (X)

Second grid:

- Column 5: All filled (X)

This has:
- Two consecutive filled columns (columns 2 and 3)

- Then a filled column on the right edge (column 5)

This matches the expression!

Third grid:
